commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh Why are your valiant men swept away. they stood not, because the LORD did drive them. Literally, "man. "Hebrew abir, (Haydock) where Apis has been perhaps formed. (Calmet) Septuagint, "Why has Apis (Complutensian omits this word) fled from thee. thy calf, thy chosen one has not remained. "(Haydock) He derides the chief idol of Egypt; or he alludes to those who fell at Charcamis, or rather who fled after they had come out to assist Sedecias, chap. , and Ezechiel xxx.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
